commands.review_summary:
The PR changes registerHook wrapping to pass the original hook context with temporary pluginConfig injection and adds a regression test for agent:bootstrap context mutation.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +67. Total +78 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main clones event.context in src/plugins/registry.ts while src/agents/bootstrap-hooks.ts reads the original event.context.bootstrapFiles after triggerInternalHook returns, so an agent:bootstrap handler assignment is lost by source inspection.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair lane is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the plugin API semantics.

target.title: fix(plugins): preserve mutable hook context
target.body:
Summary
- Preserve the original mutable hook context object when plugin registerHook handlers run.
- Temporarily expose pluginConfig to each handler and restore/remove it afterward so config does not leak onto the shared event context.
- Add regression coverage for an agent:bootstrap plugin hook replacing bootstrapFiles while still seeing pluginConfig.

Tests
- RED: node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/plugins/loader.test.ts --testNamePattern "preserves plugin hook context mutations" --reporter verbose (failed before implementation: event.context.bootstrapFiles stayed AGENTS.md/ORIGINAL_CONTEXT)
- GREEN: node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/plugins/loader.test.ts --testNamePattern "preserves plugin hook context mutations|injects plugin config into internal hook event context" --reporter dot
- GREEN: node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/plugins/loader.test.ts --reporter dot
- GREEN: node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check src/plugins/registry.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts
- GREEN: node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint src/plugins/registry.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts
- GREEN: git diff --check
- BLOCKED: node scripts/check-changed.mjs could not complete locally because pnpm dependency hydration repeatedly failed while fetching optional darwin packages from registry.npmjs.org (TimeoutError / error 23). Same failure also blocked scripts/committer and a direct pnpm install retry.
- INFO: node_modules/@typescript/native-preview-darwin-arm64/lib/tsgo --noEmit --project tsconfig.json currently fails on unrelated existing src/config/io.ts / src/secrets/config-io.ts unique-symbol export errors.

Behavior addressed: plugin registerHook handlers can mutate event.context (for example agent:bootstrap bootstrapFiles) and core observes the mutation after the hook returns.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node v23.11.1, Vitest 4.1.7 from local node_modules.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/plugins/loader.test.ts --reporter dot
Evidence after fix: src/plugins/loader.test.ts passed 150/150 tests.
Observed result after fix: the regression test sees SENTINEL.md/SENTINEL_BOOTSTRAP_CONTEXT on the original event.context and confirms pluginConfig is restored/removed after the handler.
What was not tested: full check:changed / Testbox path was blocked by local pnpm install fetch timeouts before the remote runner could start.

Closes #75245
target.author: leno23
